insights: Total quantity sold: 4,495,110 units, with average sale per invoice being 11.24 items.
Top 5 products by quantity sold account for 33% of all sales.
United Kingdom accounts for 88.8% of total sales, suggesting a highly concentrated customer base.
recommendations: Focus marketing efforts on the UK market to leverage the high number of customers.
Consider diversifying product offerings based on the top-selling items to enhance revenue streams.
Investigate outlier transactions with large quantities to ensure they are legitimate sales and assess risks.
